title: Durian Furniture is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Durian Furniture is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Durian Furniture are looking for an experienced Floor Manager based out of Ludhiana. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Durian Furniture:
Durian Furniture is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Durian Furniture!
